title: A Song Of Cheer.
content:
Here's a song of cheer
        For the whole long year:

        We've only to do our best,
            Take up our part
            With a strong, true heart - 
        The Lord will do all the rest.
meaning:
Jean Blewett's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Song Of Cheer."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
